title: Cake Delight
description: This mod adds cakes for teleportation between various dimensions(v3.1.0+), and adds the linkage between other cake-related mods and Farmer's Delight, as well as a small portion of food.
body: 下方有中文简介   ### 📖 About: Cake Delight is an addon mod for [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) which adds cakes for teleportation between various dimensions(v3.1.0+), and adds the linkage between other cake-related mods and Farmer's Delight, as well as a small portion of food. If you only need Teleport Cakes, you might as well take a look at my [Teleport Cakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/teleportcakes) Mod. In addition to having more dedicated functions, it also supports NeoForge. The mod also adds the [Just More Cakes!](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-more-cakes) to [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) recipes integration. In v3.1.0+ , you can use three teleport cakes to transfer among Nether, Overword and The End. ![Mod items](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1214/487/2025-06-08_19-04-41-png.png) ![Teleport cakes](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1214/489/2025-06-08_19-05-17-2-png.png) At The teleportation destinations of Nether and The End, Obsidian platforms and Overworld cake will be placed for return ![teleportation destinations](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1214/488/2025-06-08_19-05-36-2-png.png) This mod rarely uses mixins and is generally not prone to conflict with other mods. ### 🔨 Required Dependencies: [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) ## 中文 ### 📖关于： \ 这是一个农夫乐事（Farmer's Delight）附属，它添加了可以用于维度间传送的蛋糕、蛋糕有关模组与农夫乐事的联动，还有小部分的基于农夫乐事的食物。 如果您只需要传送蛋糕这一功能，不妨看看我的另一个[跃迁蛋糕（Teleport Cakes）](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/teleportcakes)模组。它内容专一，且支持NeoForge。 并且添加了[Just More Cakes!](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-more-cakes) 和 [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) 之间的联动。 在v3.1.0+ 该模组实现了三个可用于主世界、下界与末地间传送的蛋糕，他们使用农夫乐事的配方进行制作。 本模组几乎没有使用Mixin，一般不易与其它模组发生冲突。 ### 🔨 前置项： [农夫乐事：重织（Farmer's Delight Refabricated）](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
